alt: Seven-month-old giant panda cub at Wolong Nature Reserve in Sichuan, China
caption: Panda cubs are born tiny and pink, growing their black-and-white fur over several weeks.
acquisitionNotes: Manually verified giant panda image with correct species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/cd/Panda_Cub_from_Wolong%2C_Sichuan%2C_China.JPG
